name: Sausage-Leek Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Mince or cut the sausage into thin slices.
2. Heat butter in a large saucepan over moderate flame.
3. Add the sausage and heat, stirring for 5-6 minutes until browned.
4. Add the leeks and stir, cooking for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the dill weed.
6. Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat and simmer for 20-30 minutes.
8. Remove from heat and puree with a hand blender or food processor.
9. Place over low flame.
10. Stir in cream and grated Parmesan cheese until well combined.
11. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
12. Serve hot.
